name: Panasonic Lumix S1R II Mirrorless Camera
description: Bringing together astounding image quality, high-speed performance, and cutting-edge video tools, the Panasonic Lumix S1R II is a full-frame mirrorless camera designed for professional photographers and hybrid content creators.

features.Key Features:: 44.3MP Full-Frame CMOS Sensor | Lightweight Design, 25% Lighter than S1R | 8K 30p & 4K 120p 10-Bit Video Recording | 6.4K Open Gate Shooting | Up to 40 fps Raw Shooting with AF-C/AF-S | 5.76m-Dot 0.78x-Magnification OLED LVF | Phase Hybrid AF with AI Tracking | 8-stop, 5-axis IBIS; Active I.S. | ISO 80-102400 | SD Card Slot & CFexpress Type B Slot
features.What's in the box?: 1x Panasonic Lumix S1R II Body Camera | 1x Battery Pack | 1x Battery Charger | 1x Shoulder Strap | 1x Body Cap | 1x Hot Shoe Cover | 1x Cover for the Battery Grip Connector | 1x Manual Book | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi Panasonic Gobel Indonesia
